query: double exposure ghostly silhouette overlapping portrait
message: sub:double_exposure — anti_aesthetic — overlapping ghostly portraits, doubled silhouettes, layered composites

response.objective_caption: A sepia-toned portrait showing two male figures: a young blond boy standing behind a seated adult man with short dark hair, both shirtless, positioned against a dark background with draped fabric to one side.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A sepia-toned double exposure portrait showing a translucent young blond boy standing behind a seated adult man with short dark hair, both shirtless, with the boy's form appearing ghosted and layered over the man's shoulder. The image is heavily faded to muted sepia tones with deep shadow crushing that obscures the man's lower face and body, while both subjects display somber, melancholic expressions against a dark background with draped fabric to one side.
